Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I'm on it. I've used this equipment a number of times before...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}It should be designed to allow us to operate the most basic systems on our own.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}...No good. If only it wasn't so late at night...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I'm sorry. I tried contacting the lab, but they're unlikely to send help anytime soon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}It's okay. I think I've almost got it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Her vitals are onscreen now! Let's see...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Her synaptic circuits... They're completely burned out...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}There must have been a massive system overload that took her way over capacity.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I imagine it's related to her gaining the ability to use multiple Personas...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Burned out? But... She can be fixed, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}It would be easy enough to replace the necessary parts, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}The Aigis we know is already... gone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Geez! Way to give us a heart attack, you sleepyhead![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}You took so long to wake up, we thought you were dead...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Her synaptic circuits shouldn't even be receiving power anymore...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}It's almost like... she's really alive.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 53 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Um, I'm sorry if I caused you all concern.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 53 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}I was... having a dream. The first one in quite some time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 53 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}It was full of memories of the time I spent with everyone... and...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 53 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}"Strength of heart, when united, is barred by no door"...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 1 53 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}Painful goodbyes may be one of the most difficult aspects of living...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 1 53 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}But I believe that spending time with those who care about you is one of the most joyous.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 1 53 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}I... really am lucky to have such wonderful friends.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}We were right next to each other, suffering over the exact same things...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}Looking back, I feel kinda stupid. Why did we ever think we were all alone?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}I guess we're more alike than we thought.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}Man... Is this nightmare finally over? We're not gonna wake up and see April 1st again, are we?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}Hey, quit tempting fate, would you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}Aw, crap... With the danger gone, I feel like I'm gonna pass out! I could practically sleep standing up...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}All right... Let's head back to our rooms and get some rest for tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}Was there anything else to take care of before we turn in?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}Actually, there is one thing I'd like to announce.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}With regard to collecting everyone's Evokers... I'd like to reverse that decision.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}This whole incident gave me a lot to think about.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}In a way, I may have been trying to bury the past by collecting the symbols of our power and locking them away.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}But even with no Shadows left to fight, we remain in a battle against ourselves.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}So... Everyone should hold onto their own.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}Until the day when everyone can change...[n]{f 1 1}
